content_body: My family and I just returned home from our 4th of July week stay at your beautiful cabin. We just wanted to tell you that it has become a tradition for us to stay the 4th of July week at cabins all over the country. We've stayed from Florida all the way up as far north as Vermont. I just wanted to tell you that the Aska Adventure Outpost was the most beautiful and thoroughly equipped luxurious cabin we've stayed in. You guys really thought of everything...My 2 girls loved the pool table and the hot tub. We also saw 3 deer on the property which we were able to photograph. We also fell in love with Blue Ridge. What a nice town and you couldn't find nicer people. We plan on staying with you again!
title: Best North Georgia Cabin Rental in the Country!
